notes:
Game crashes upon startup with a "Fatal Error!" due to Proton being unable to play the movie files. However, by moving the .mp4s out of the Movies folder, it will bypass the intro videos and go straight to the login screen.

From that point onwards the game itself runs flawlessly. Played multiple skirmish games, both online with friends and offline vs. bots without any issues popping up. DXVK is recommended for best performance.
title: A Year Of Rain

notes: After installation the game had and fatal error. After removing I could start the game and play the game normally.
title: A Year Of Rain
